sessionStart.prompt: SESSION START: Classify per execution-router.mdc. BA-resume requires: (1) Read SESSION-CONTEXT.md + initiative-tracker.md, (2) present the Re-entry Card (initiative | phase | day | where we are | next action | Jira delta | sync status), (3) AskQuestion with clickable options including recommended next action. Missing any = non-compliant. Input: $ARGUMENTS
